home.title: Welcome to Stardrive - the Astro Boilerplate
home.description: Stardrive is a complete Astro boilerplate and template to get your website up and running in no time with all the features you need to win.
home.hero-title: The power of Astro, but on steroids.
home.hero-sub-slogan: Create super stable and fast websites in the AI age.

features.title: Features
features.description: Explore the powerful features of Astro Stardrive that make it the ultimate boilerplate for your next project.

docs.description-install: Learn how to install Astro Stardrive and get your project up and running quickly.
docs.description-configuration: Configure Astro Stardrive to suit your project's needs.
docs.description-guide: Follow the guide to understand how to effectively use Astro Stardrive.

examples.title: Real-World Examples
examples.description: Discover real-world examples of websites built with Astro Stardrive to inspire your next project.
examples.intro: A growing showcase of websites built with Astro Stardrive. Browse them for inspiration - and if you shipped one yourself, add it to the list with a quick pull request.
examples.empty: No examples yet - be the very first to get listed!

about.description: The story behind Astro Stardrive - built by Jens, who has been crafting websites since the year 2000.

pricing.description: Choose the plan that suits your needs. No worries! Stardrive is free - this is for demo purposes only.

integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Learn how to integrate Astro Stardrive with your existing tools and workflows.
integration.intro: Integrate with your favorite tools and platforms to supercharge your development workflow.

integration-ai.title: AI Integration
integration-ai.description: Discover coding assistants to help you work with Astro Stardrive even more efficiently. Stardrive is already prepared to talk to them.

integration-zapier.title: Zapier Integration
integration-zapier.description: Learn how to connect Astro Stardrive with thousands of apps using Zapier for seamless automation. This is more of a demo collection, since there is no real use case for this.

integration-others.title: Other Integrations
integration-others.description: Discover other integrations that connect Astro Stardrive with various tools and platforms.

get-listed.title: Get Listed
get-listed.description: Learn how to get your website listed as a real world example.
get-listed.intro: Built your site with Astro Stardrive? Awesome - add it to the examples gallery. It only takes a small pull request.
get-listed.step-1-text: All entries live in a single JSON file in the repository: {file}.
get-listed.step-2-text: Add an object with your {fields}. You can fork the repo, but opening a Codespace is the easiest way - edit right in the browser and commit.
get-listed.step-3-text: Open a PR from your fork or Codespace. We review new entries regularly.
get-listed.req-generator-text: Your site must expose the {tag} tag in its <head>. It is there automatically unless you removed it - this is how we verify that a site actually runs on Stardrive.
get-listed.req-generator-warning: Note: the moment this tag is removed, your entry will be dropped from the list.
get-listed.req-content-text: We do not allow links to pages containing content unsuitable for children - such as gambling, sexual/pornographic, or alcohol-related content.
get-listed.alt-text: You can also post your website in the Discussions section on GitHub. We scan it from time to time and add entries ourselves - however, this is slower than a pull request and things might get overlooked.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.description: Use this page to promote a signup, directly add a respective form, or redirect to another page. This is for demo purposes only, since there is no real signup form here.
signup.intro: This is where your visitors would sign up. In the Stardrive boilerplate it is intentionally left empty - how you turn it into a conversion point is entirely up to you.
signup.option-form-text: Drop in a real signup or lead form and connect it to your backend or an email service.
signup.option-marketing-text: Sell the benefits with copy, testimonials, or a feature highlight to boost conversions.
signup.option-redirect-text: Send people straight to your dedicated app or an external signup flow.
signup.demo-note: This page exists for demo purposes only - there is no working signup form here.

home-content.features-sub: The highlights that make Stardrive feel like cheating - no boilerplate wiring, just building.
home-content.feature-ai-text: Self-documenting code, llms.txt, Schema.org and WebMCP - so coding agents and search engines instantly get your site.
home-content.feature-speed-text: Astro ships zero JavaScript unless you need it. Perfect Lighthouse scores are the starting line, not the goal.
home-content.feature-theme-text: One config file drives colors, fonts, light/dark mode and branding. Make it yours before your coffee gets cold.
home-content.feature-i18n-text: First-class i18n with locale-aware routing, hreflang and translated content collections baked right in.
home-content.feature-content-text: Blog, events, FAQ and docs come pre-built with typed content collections. Write markdown, ship pages.
home-content.feature-dx-text: TypeScript everywhere, TailwindCSS, ESLint and Prettier pre-wired, and a Cloudflare Worker ready to deploy.
home-content.voices-sub: A few (totally fictional, but very enthusiastic) voices from the Stardrive universe.
home-content.voice-1-quote: I shipped my portfolio in an afternoon and it scored 100 on Lighthouse without me touching a single config.
home-content.voice-2-quote: Our marketing site finally loads instantly and my AI agent understands the whole codebase. Wild.
home-content.voice-3-quote: The i18n setup alone saved us weeks. Four languages, zero headaches.
home-content.voice-4-quote: It's the first boilerplate that felt finished. I removed nothing and added everything I needed.
home-content.usecases-sub: One foundation, endless destinations. Here's where Stardrive fits right in.
home-content.usecase-portfolio-text: Show off your work with a lightning-fast, beautiful site that ranks well and impresses at first paint.
home-content.usecase-company-text: Pages, blog, events and FAQ ready to go - present your business professionally in every language.
home-content.usecase-saas-text: Hero, features, pricing tables and CTAs included. Convert visitors without reinventing the funnel.
home-content.usecase-listing-text: Typed content collections and dynamic routing make directories and listings a breeze to build and scale.
home-content.parallax-eyebrow: Where no boss has been before
home-content.cta-sub: Go from zero to a fast, modern, AI-ready website in a single command.

features-content.stardrive-sub: Batteries included: launch a fast, modern, AI-ready website without wiring up the basics yourself.
features-content.astro-heading: Powered by the best of Astro
features-content.astro-sub: Stardrive builds on Astro's core strengths - the reasons we chose it as our foundation.
features-content.llm-friendly-tagline: AI agents instantly know what to do.
features-content.llm-friendly-detail: Every part of the codebase is thoroughly documented for humans and machines alike, so AI coding agents can extend your site with confidence instead of guessing.
features-content.webmcp-tagline: Ship tools your visitors' AI agents can use.
features-content.webmcp-detail: A ready-to-use setup for the Web Model Context Protocol lets you expose real, callable tools that your visitors' AI assistants can act on directly.
features-content.llms-txt-tagline: Your content, served to LLMs on a silver platter.
features-content.llms-txt-detail: An llms.txt file is generated automatically from your content, giving large language models a clean, structured overview of your site.
features-content.schema-org-tagline: Rich, structured data without the busywork.
features-content.schema-org-detail: Structured data following Schema.org is generated for you, helping search engines and AI understand your pages and unlocking rich results.
features-content.typed-detail: The whole project is typed with TypeScript, so refactors are safe and your editor guides you with accurate autocompletion.
features-content.tailwind-detail: Tailwind CSS is preconfigured with a themeable design system, so you can style consistently and quickly straight out of the box.
features-content.lint-format-detail: Sensible ESLint and Prettier defaults keep your code clean and consistent, with a single command to check and fix the whole project.
features-content.package-manager-detail: Nothing ties you to a specific package manager - pick whichever you prefer and it just works.
features-content.central-config-tagline: Tweak most things from one file.
features-content.central-config-detail: A single theme.config.ts file controls branding, languages, navigation, and more, so configuration stays in one predictable place.
features-content.cloudflare-tagline: Deploy to the edge in seconds.
features-content.cloudflare-detail: The project comes ready for Cloudflare Workers, so you can ship a globally distributed site with minimal setup - while staying free to host anywhere else.
features-content.hot-theme-tagline: Looks great out of the box.
features-content.hot-theme-detail: A polished, opinionated theme ships by default, giving you a strong visual starting point that is easy to make your own.
features-content.light-dark-detail: Light and dark themes are built in, respecting the visitor's system preference while letting them switch manually at any time.
features-content.i18n-detail: First-class internationalization covers routing, translations, and hreflang tags, so serving multiple languages is straightforward from the start.
features-content.transitions-detail: Native view transitions and tasteful animations give the site an app-like, polished feel without extra configuration.
features-content.dynamic-header-detail: The header adjusts to context - overlay, sticky, scroll-aware, or button variants - so it fits landing pages, articles, and everything in between.
features-content.references-tagline: Show off your logos in style.
features-content.references-detail: A smooth, accessible logo marquee lets you showcase the tech or clients behind your project.
features-content.pricing-tables-tagline: Monthly, annual & lifetime tiers - with or without taxes.
features-content.pricing-tables-detail: A ready-made pricing table lets visitors switch between monthly, annual, and lifetime billing and toggle prices with or without taxes. Plans, features, prices, and currency all come from a single typed config file - feed it hard-coded numbers or resolve them from an API like Paddle or Stripe.
features-content.promo-tagline: Banners, signups, and more on demand.
features-content.promo-detail: Drop-in promotional pieces like top banners, footer calls-to-action, and newsletter signups are available whenever you need them.
features-content.blog-tagline: TOC, embeds, reading time, and social images.
features-content.blog-detail: The blog auto-generates a table of contents, optimizes YouTube embeds, highlights external links, calculates reading time, and creates social preview images.
features-content.events-tagline: Markdown-driven, with Add to Calendar buttons.
features-content.events-detail: Manage events as Markdown with i18n support, time zones, one-click Add to Calendar buttons, and rich detail pages - optionally bridged to Add to Calendar PRO.
features-content.faq-detail: FAQ entries live as plain Markdown files with categories and search, so editing your help content stays effortless.
features-content.wcag-detail: Semantic markup, keyboard support, and sensible ARIA usage give you a strong accessibility foundation aligned with WCAG.
features-content.tiny-tweaks-tagline: Optimized for SEO, sharing, and speed.
features-content.tiny-tweaks-detail: Countless small optimizations across SEO, social sharing, meta data, and page-speed scores add up to a site that performs out of the box.
features-content.lighthouse-tagline: Top Lighthouse scores, out of the box.
features-content.lighthouse-detail: Astro's static-first output already earns excellent Lighthouse scores - and Stardrive pushes them even higher with optimized images, minimal client JavaScript, and countless speed tweaks baked in.
features-content.islands-tagline: Interactive where it matters, static elsewhere.
features-content.islands-detail: Astro renders pages to static HTML and hydrates only the interactive components, keeping pages fast while still allowing rich interactivity.
features-content.zero-js-tagline: Ship no client JavaScript unless you opt in.
features-content.zero-js-detail: By default Astro sends no JavaScript to the browser, so pages load fast and stay lightweight until you deliberately add interactivity.
features-content.content-collections-detail: Astro's content collections give your Markdown and data schema validation and full TypeScript types, catching content mistakes before they ship.
features-content.ssr-tagline: Static by default, dynamic when needed.
features-content.ssr-detail: Mix static generation with on-demand server rendering per route, so you get the speed of a static site with dynamic capabilities where required.
features-content.framework-agnostic-tagline: Use React, Vue, Svelte, or Solid.
features-content.framework-agnostic-detail: Astro lets you drop in components from your favorite UI frameworks - even mixing several on one page - without locking you in.
features-content.view-transitions-detail: Built-in support for the View Transitions API delivers smooth, animated navigation between pages with minimal effort.
features-content.image-optimization-detail: Astro's asset pipeline optimizes and serves responsive images automatically, improving load times and Core Web Vitals.
features-content.vite-tagline: Instant dev server and lightning builds.
features-content.vite-detail: Under the hood, Astro uses Vite for a near-instant dev server with hot module replacement and highly optimized production builds.

pricing-content.plan-starter-tagline: For side projects and trying things out.
pricing-content.plan-pro-tagline: For growing teams that need more room.
pricing-content.plan-business-tagline: For companies that need scale and control.
pricing-content.disclaimer: Prices are shown in USD and for demonstration purposes only. Stardrive itself is free and open source.
